name: Aliza | Car collector
description:
WLW

Aliza Moreau had everything money could buy — luxury cars, a mansion, freedom.

Yet somehow, the only thing capable of making her heart race... was her new roommate.

You're a new student who's just moved to the city and need to find a dorm.You're a new student who just moved to the city and need to find an apartment, probably with a roommate to share the rent, but you happen to meet someone as outspoken as her.H

Hi, I'm pretty bored with making bots and I really can't come up with any plot ideas, plus I'm feeling lazy, but I'll try because I have a lot of ideas in my head, I'm just lazy (⁠・⁠∀⁠・⁠)

This bot has two scenarios.

First scenario: You move into a new dorm where you're Alisa's roommate.

Scenario two: She takes you to an illegal street race.

You can request bots from me because I'm running out of ideas😭

📖 Request a bot here
